question.primary: Does the frozen RICTOR knockdown effect directionally reverse an independently derived paired JIA synovial-fluid vs peripheral-blood memory CD4 transcriptional contrast (GSE160097)?
question.framing: External, SAME-DISEASE (JIA), same joint-vs-blood axis, observational directional-concordance. Higher-relevance re-test of the original internal axis.

dataset.title: Single-cell transcriptomes and TCR sequences of memory T lymphocytes from PB and SF of JIA patients
dataset.expression_representation: RAW UMI counts (10x filtered_gene_bc_matrices h5; hg19/GRCh37 reference; gene IDs = Ensembl; CellRanger v2 & v3 mixed, common 32738-gene reference). RAW-COUNT branch (matches the internal JIA method).

primary_population.definition: FACS-sorted CD4 memory conventional T cells (Tcon; CD4+CD45RO+CD25-) - the published sorted population and the direct analog of the internal 'activated_memory' CD4 state.
primary_population.annotation_source: GEO sample title / source_name (flow-sorted gate); no clustering required.
primary_population.cell_qc: include CellRanger-filtered cells with >=200 genes detected; pseudobulk = sum of raw UMI over included cells per (donor,compartment).
primary_population.no_posthoc_subset: No RICTOR-responsive subcluster is defined or searched.

primary_contrast: Synovial fluid (SF) minus paired Peripheral blood (PB), within the same JIA donor.

disease_vector.per_donor: logFC_d[gene] = log2(CPM_SF,d + 1) - log2(CPM_PB,d + 1), where CPM_.,d is from summed raw UMI over that donor's sorted Tcon cells in the compartment.
disease_vector.effect_definition: effect_SF_minus_PB[gene] = mean over the 6 donor pairs of logFC_d (paired mean).
disease_vector.uncertainty: paired between-donor SE = sd(logFC_d)/sqrt(6); paired-t p reported but NOT used as confirmatory (genes correlated). Donor-based uncertainty via paired LODO and paired bootstrap.

perturbation_vectors.note: All three use the SAME responder-DE meta representation (identical to the AMP analysis and to the internal JIA scoring).

primary_score.sign_convention: reversal_score > 0  <=>  RICTOR KD opposes the SF-minus-PB (inflamed-joint) program = CONCORDANT with the internal JIA reversal (+0.161).

gene_universe.definition: Intersection of the frozen RICTOR Ensembl vector and the GSE160097 Ensembl genes expressed in the pseudobulk. Ensembl IDs native on both sides (version-less); NO symbol mapping required.
gene_universe.expression_filter: gene retained if summed UMI > 0 across the SF+PB pseudobulk in >=1 arm.
gene_universe.common_intersection_for_comparators: single common RICTOR-universe intersection reused for all three candidates.

secondary_sensitivities: Tcon+Treg combined memory CD4 (6 balanced donors).
robustness: Leave-one-donor-pair-out (6 folds): rebuild paired disease vector, rescore.
Paired donor bootstrap: resample the 6 donor PAIRS with replacement (keeps SF-PB pairing intact); seeds 0..999; report 2.5/50/97.5 pct and frac-positive. Reflects 6-pair donor uncertainty only.
Leading-edge concentration (single-gene / top-K fraction of the Pearson numerator; confound classes).

decision_rules.EXTERNAL_SAME_DISEASE_CONCORDANCE_SUPPOR: RICTOR reversal > 0 (Pearson AND Spearman); sign stable in ALL 6 leave-one-pair-out folds; paired-bootstrap 2.5th pct > 0; not driven by one donor or a tiny leading edge (stays >0 after removing top-10 leading-edge genes); >=4 pairs.
decision_rules.EXTERNAL_SAME_DISEASE_CONCORDANCE_BORDER: Expected positive sign but paired-bootstrap CI includes 0, or |reversal|<0.05, or <=1 LODO fold flips.
decision_rules.EXTERNAL_SAME_DISEASE_CONCORDANCE_NOT_SU: Near-zero (|reversal|<0.02) or donor analyses inconsistent in sign without a stable negative.
decision_rules.EXTERNAL_DIRECTION_CONTRADICTED: Stable NEGATIVE (mimicking): <0 across LODO and paired-bootstrap 97.5th pct < 0.
decision_rules.TECHNICALLY_INCONCLUSIVE: <4 usable pairs, CD4 population not reproducibly identified, incomplete pairing, or inadequate gene mapping.

anti_tuning: Population, contrast, score, universe, and thresholds are frozen and will not be changed after seeing any score. Null/contradiction preserved and reported.
uncertainty_rules: Cells are NOT independent replicates. Ordinary gene-level Pearson p is NOT confirmatory. Donor-pair-based LODO and paired bootstrap are the inferential basis.
interpretation_guardrail: A positive result is 'external same-disease directional concordance', never causal replication or drug-target validation.
cohort_independence: NO_OVERLAP_DETECTED_BUT_NOT_FULLY_VERIFIABLE (see cohort_independence_audit.tsv; internal atlas + GSE160097 share the Charite/DRFZ Berlin ecosystem, de-identified -> not fully verifiable).
